name: Respond.io Customer Messaging Platform API
what_it_does: Customer messaging and conversational CRM platform with REST API — unifying WhatsApp Business, Facebook Messenger, Instagram, Telegram, LINE, and email into a shared inbox with AI automation, contact management, and analytics.
use_cases: Sending WhatsApp, Telegram, and Facebook messages to customers via unified REST API
Managing customer contact profiles and conversation history programmatically
Triggering automated message flows from CRM events or agent workflows
Building chatbot integrations that escalate to human agents via respond.io API
Querying conversation analytics and agent performance metrics for reporting
not_for: Developer-first messaging infrastructure (use Twilio for programmable messaging)
Simple transactional email/SMS without conversational support needs
Teams wanting open-source or self-hosted messaging infrastructure
best_when: A team manages high-volume customer conversations across WhatsApp, Telegram, and social messaging with need for shared inbox, AI automation, and API integration.
avoid_when: You primarily need transactional messaging without conversational CRM features, or need developer-grade programmable messaging APIs.

auth.notes: API key from respond.io account. Bearer token authentication. Workspace-scoped access. Webhook support for contact and message events. Integration tokens for channel connections.

pricing.paid_tiers: Starter from $79/month for 5 users; Pro from $159; Business from $279; Enterprise custom
pricing.notes: Per-workspace pricing with user seat limits. Popular in Southeast Asia and LATAM markets for WhatsApp-heavy customer communication. Active development with AI features. Strong WhatsApp Business API expertise.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per plan; WhatsApp limits apply from Meta

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API covers contacts, conversations, messages, and channels. Webhook support for message events. No official SDK — standard HTTP calls. API documentation covers core workflows with examples.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Message sends create new messages. Contact creation/update is upsert-style by ID or phone. Read operations idempotent. Conversation status updates idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: WhatsApp Business API requires Meta approval and template approval for outbound messages
Rate limits from underlying channels (WhatsApp, Telegram) apply — not just respond.io limits
Contact identification by phone number — ensure E.164 format for all phone numbers
Message template pre-approval required for WhatsApp marketing messages

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. API key auth. SOC2 certified. GDPR compliant with US and EU data residency. WhatsApp Business API compliance through Meta BSP status.
